name: Focus Timer starts a countdown and pause halts it
description: From the sidebar the user opens the Focus Timer, sees the MM:SS time and a Start control with a suggested focus/break split, starts a session that counts down, and pausing actually stops the countdown.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Focus Timer link in the sidebar

Verify the Focus Timer page shows a circular timer with a time displayed in MM:SS format inside it, a 'Start Focus Session' button, and a suggested focus/break split (for example '25 min focus / 5 min break')
Click the Start Focus Session button
Wait about three seconds for the countdown to progress
Verify the timer is now in a running Focus state showing a 'Block 1 / 4' indicator and a Pause control, and the MM:SS time has decreased from its starting value rather than staying frozen
Verify the timer shows a paused indicator and the MM:SS time stays the same across the wait, confirming pause actually halted the countdown
